commands.author: MonkeyLeeT

target.title: fix(reply): deliver plugin binding replies
target.body:
## Summary
- Deliver handled plugin-owned binding replies even when group/channel source delivery is `message_tool_only`.
- Keep automatic binding fallback, decline, and error notices suppressed under `message_tool_only` by retaining the existing `sendBindingNotice` guard.
- Add a Discord channel regression test for a Codex-owned binding reply under `groupChat.visibleReplies: "message_tool"`.

## Root Cause
`message_tool_only` sets `suppressAutomaticSourceDelivery`, and the handled plugin-owned `inbound_claim` reply was sent through `sendBindingNotice()`. That helper returns before delivery when source delivery is suppressed, so a successful Codex binding turn could complete without any channel-visible reply.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts -t "delivers plugin-owned binding replies under message-tool-only source delivery"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/commands.test.ts -t "codex-cli-node-session|bind here|inbound"`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Discord/Codex plugin-owned conversation binding replies are no longer silenced when group/channel visible replies require the message tool.

Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree on branch `codex/87721-plugin-binding-replies`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/commands.test.ts -t "codex-cli-node-session|bind here|inbound"
git diff --check
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local
```

Evidence after fix: The new regression test proves a handled plugin-owned Discord binding reply is delivered with `sourceReplyDeliveryMode: "message_tool_only"` while `replyResolver` is not called. The full dispatch test file passed, preserving existing sendPolicy deny and private final reply behavior.

Observed result after fix: 172 dispatch tests passed; the Codex binding/command slice passed its matching test; diff whitespace check passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: No live Discord/Codex paired-node session was run; verification is focused local source-level regression coverage.

Fixes #87721
